focal_character_timelines.selection_reason: Aligned with the movie's ICRP character set.
focal_character_timelines.task3_relevance: Directly aligned with the same key character used in ICRP.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Riley, Charlie, and Mike prepare to raid a town in the Dead Reckoning with Cholo and guerrillas. Cholo excitedly leaves on a motorcycle, revealing it's his last day. Riley emphasizes completing the job safely. Mike questions the 'sky flowers,' which Riley confirms work by distracting Stenches.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Announces it is his last day with excitement, contrasting Riley's seriousness about the job.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Departing for raid on motorcycle
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Reason for last day and future plans
evidence_quotes: CHOLO (Grinning) My last day, too.
Cholo mounts a MOTORCYCLE, REVS the engine, and heads out.
CHOLO (CONT'D) YEEEE-HAAAAAAAA!

auxiliary.persona_anchor: Displays excitement and independence as he leaves on motorcycle.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Cholo, Mike, and Foxy enter a liquor store despite Riley's objections; Charlie notes booze isn't essential, but Foxy values it highly, prompting the group to proceed into the dark store.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Ignores Riley's objection and enters the liquor store with Foxy to pursue profit.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Inside the dark liquor store with Foxy and Mike.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Conflict with Riley over unauthorized looting for personal gain.
evidence_quotes: CHOLO SCREECHES to a stop at a LIQUOR STORE with MIKE and FOXY.
RILEY (To Cholo) I'm not risking anybody's ass just so you can pick up some side money.
CHOLO Not askin' you to.
Cholo and Foxy start into the liquor store.

auxiliary.persona_anchor: Profit-motivated and defiant of authority.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Cholo defends his pursuit of wealth and a better life, inspired by a luxury broadcast, while Riley argues they'll never be accepted due to their background, as guerrillas unload supplies nearby.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Guerrilla pursuing wealth and Fiddler's Green membership
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Cholo defends his goal to buy into Fiddler's Green, rejecting Riley's criticism about their background and the risks involved.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Accumulate enough money to purchase membership in Fiddler's Green.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Determined to proceed despite Riley's warning that they will never be accepted.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Whether Cholo can overcome the social barriers to entry into Fiddler's Green.
evidence_quotes: It is nice.
Holding his case of Dom Perignon and his box of Cohibas, CHOLO looks with FOXY at a monitor mounted to a white-tiled subway station wall.
I'm gonna have a place, Riley. My own place! And now I got enough money to buy my way in.
RILEY You're dreaming, Cholo. They'd never let me in. They'll never let you in. We're the wrong kind.

auxiliary.persona_anchor: Driven by a desire to escape poverty, as shown by his reference to his father's fruit-picking job.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: The bitten guard weakens as the Hanged Man attacks; Cholo takes a gun, kills the Hanged Man and the bitten guard, then threatens the surviving guard, justifying his actions.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Kills a bitten man with a poker and prepares to strike the reanimated hanged man.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Lifting poker, ready to strike in the dark kitchen.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Confrontation with the reanimated hanged man.
evidence_quotes: Cholo stands over the Young Man and stabs him in the head with the poker
CHOLO Shut up! I gotta hear.
Cholo lifts the poker, ready to strike.

status_updates: Killed hanged man and bitten guard
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Acts decisively to eliminate immediate threats.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Cholo confronts Kaufman, who denies his membership despite years of service, leading to a threat and Cholo's violent removal by security after revealing incriminating knowledge.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Cholo demands membership in Fiddler's Green from Kaufman, is denied, threatens to reveal incriminating knowledge from the garbage, and is fired and dragged out by security.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: To become a member of Fiddler's Green using his savings and service as leverage.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Fired by Kaufman and physically removed from the conference room by security guards.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: His threat to expose what he knows about the members' garbage.
evidence_quotes: THREE SECURITY GUARDS rush in, GRAB Cholo, and drag him away.

auxiliary.persona_anchor: An employee whose long-term service is rejected, leading to a violent outburst and termination.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Cholo's team avoids fighting the stenches, using the chaos to seize a truck while gunners fire at walkers near a wire fence.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Leader directing team to avoid combat and seize truck
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Cholo stops his team from engaging in battle and orders them to seize Dead Reckoning during the chaos.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Possesses Dead Reckoning
evidence_quotes: CHOLO (Stopping them) Ain't our fight. Stenches are making it easy for us. C Let's grab the truck.
HOLO and his team sprint across the lot to DEAD RECKONING.

auxiliary.persona_anchor: Tactical leader who prioritizes seizing assets over unnecessary combat.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Cholo demands his money from the bank, threatening to destroy the recipient's ivory tower with Dead Reckoning if not paid.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Cholo demands his money from Kaufman and threatens to attack with Dead Reckoning if not paid.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Has issued an ultimatum with a direct threat of violence using Dead Reckoning.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Kaufman's compliance with the demand.
evidence_quotes: But you know what I'm gonna need? Money.
I want my money out of your bank.
And if you don't give it to me, I'm gonna blow you out of your fuckin' ivory tower.
I've got Dead Reckoning.

status_updates: Reveals possession of Dead Reckoning as weapon
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Uses possession of Dead Reckoning to extort money.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Cholo, confronting Riley via microphone, reveals Riley tracked him using a transmitter; Riley insists on being involved, but Cholo hesitates, prompting tension with his companion Foxy.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Leader confronting follower about tracking method
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Learns Riley tracked him using a transmitter in the truck, acknowledges Riley's cleverness, and decides to include him despite Foxy's objection.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Ordered to open up for Riley, allowing him to join.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Foxy's objection to including Riley is overridden but not resolved.
evidence_quotes: Tracking you. With this.
You were always a smart guy, Riley. Much smarter'n me.
Open up!

auxiliary.persona_anchor: Shows respect for Riley's skills and exercises authority in crew decisions.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Pretty Boy prepares to fire, torn between targeting Kaufman and sparing innocents; Cholo justifies revenge, blaming Kaufman for corrupting him while Foxy maintains control.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Cholo blames Kaufman for corrupting him and causing the deaths of friends, justifying his plan for revenge.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Cholo remains committed to revenge, with his group under control and confrontation ongoing.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Revenge against Kaufman is pending execution.
evidence_quotes: Foxy, keep `em covered.

auxiliary.persona_anchor: Cholo openly accuses Kaufman of turning him into a goon and betraying him, showing resentment.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Kaufman shoots Big Daddy, who remains focused on him despite the injury; out of ammo, Kaufman is pulled by Knipp into a stairway as Big Daddy, unlike other Walkers, continues toward them with rage.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Bitten man seeking vengeance on Kaufman
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Reveals he has been bitten, confronts Kaufman, shoots him with arrows, and spares Knipp
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Dead
evidence_quotes: Cholo shoots. An arrow hits Kaufman in the back of his left calf.
CHOLO (Calmly reloading) You can go, Knipp, but not him.
Cholo shoots another arrow. This one hits Kaufman in the shoulder.

auxiliary.persona_anchor: Acting on vengeance despite being bitten

focal_character_timelines.timeline_summary: Cholo Denbo is a guerrilla member driven by ambition to buy his way into Fiddler's Green, leading him to defy authority and seize the armed vehicle Dead Reckoning. He extorts his former boss Kaufman, escalating conflicts with Riley and others. After being bitten, he confronts Kaufman in a final act of revenge and is killed.

focal_character_timelines.selection_reason: Aligned with the movie's ICRP character set.
focal_character_timelines.task3_relevance: Directly aligned with the same key character used in ICRP.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Riley and Mike see three dead things approaching from the town, drawn by the smell of life and blood.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Riley states that the dead things can smell life and blood, indicating they are aware of the survivors' presence.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Riley is watching three dead things lumber toward them and has identified their ability to detect smell.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: The dead things are approaching, likely attracted by the smell of life and blood.
evidence_quotes: RILEY and MIKE watch THREE DEAD THINGS lumber toward them R from the town below.
ILEY They know we're here. They can smell life. Smell blood.

status_updates: Riley is under threat from approaching dead things.
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Riley is attentive and comments on the dead's sensory capabilities.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Riley shoots the clown-suited zombie five times, killing it, but Mike is shocked to realize Riley is also a poor shot, having never used his guns before.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Riley saves Mike from a clown-suited zombie but reveals his own poor shooting.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Riley shoots the zombie multiple times to save Mike, leading Mike to realize Riley is also a poor shot.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Riley and Mike survive the attack, with Mike aware of Riley's poor shooting skills.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: The impact of their mutual lack of shooting skill on future survival.
evidence_quotes: Riley mutters, 'Great. I'm out here with a guy who can't shoot.'
Riley FIRES his .45. BLAM! The bullet SHATTERS the Clown's shoulder cap
Riley fires four more times.
Jesus. You can't shoot, neither!

relation_updates: Riley's adversarial attitude toward Mike is complicated by mutual revealed incompetence.
status_updates: Riley is revealed to be a poor shot.
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Protective but revealed to be incompetent with firearms.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Riley, Charlie, and Mike prepare to raid a town in the Dead Reckoning with Cholo and guerrillas. Cholo excitedly leaves on a motorcycle, revealing it's his last day. Riley emphasizes completing the job safely. Mike questions the 'sky flowers,' which Riley confirms work by distracting Stenches.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Leader on his final day of duty
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Riley states it is his last day and instructs the group to complete the raid without anyone getting killed.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Complete the raid with all members alive.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: The assault team departs for the town in vehicles, with Riley and Charlie returning to Dead Reckoning.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Whether the raid will be completed safely on Riley's last day.
evidence_quotes: RILEY We go in, do our job, and get out, all of us alive, okay? I don't want any fuck-ups on my last day out here.
CHOLO (Grinning) My last day, too.

relation_updates: Riley expresses affection for Charlie's optimism.
Tension with Cholo remains but mission-focused.
status_updates: Riley is on his last day of duty.
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Riley prioritizes mission safety and expresses concern about last-day errors.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Cholo is saved by Riley, but Mike is bitten by a zombie cop and commits suicide to avoid turning; the group evacuates as more zombies emerge.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: protector who assists Cholo and attempts to save Mike
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Riley helps Cholo to his feet after a zombie is killed, then goes to Mike after he is bitten and witnesses Mike's suicide.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Protect group members, but Mike's death occurs despite Riley's attempt to help.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Mike is dead, and the group evacuates the store.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Riley's devastation from Mike's suicide and its effect on the group.
evidence_quotes: RILEY extending a hand to help him to his feet.
Riley goes to Mike.
RILEY (Kneeling) It's alright, son. You're gonna be alright.
Riley, stunned, lets the corpse slide to the floor. He looks into the rookie's open eyes, devastated.

relation_updates: Riley briefly cooperates with Cholo during the attack.
Riley's bond with Mike ends tragically.
status_updates: Riley is inside the store during the attack.
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Protective but unable to prevent Mike's death.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Cholo defends his pursuit of wealth and a better life, inspired by a luxury broadcast, while Riley argues they'll never be accepted due to their background, as guerrillas unload supplies nearby.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Confronting Cholo over profit and moral purpose.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Riley assaults Cholo and argues their work should bring people needed items, not for profit, stating they are excluded from the elite.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Riley and Cholo's relationship is openly hostile after Riley rejects Cholo's pursuit of wealth and elite status.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: The conflict over whether their work should prioritize people's needs or profit, and their exclusion from the elite.
evidence_quotes: Riley lunges at Cholo, takes hold of his shirt, and SLAMS him against the wall.
RILEY We take the risk to bring in things people need. Not to make a few extra bucks selling liquor.
RILEY You're dreaming, Cholo. They'd never let me in. They'll never let you in. We're the wrong kind.

relation_updates: Riley's relationship with Cholo becomes openly hostile and adversarial.
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Riley values bringing necessary items to people over making money and believes they are not accepted by the.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Fiddler's Green is a secure high-rise in the city center, home to the elite, surrounded by vacant buildings forming the 'golden triangle.' Riley quits his job, leaving his ID behind as he exits.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Riley tells the security guard he is quitting and leaves his ID behind when offered it back, walking away from the checkpoint.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Riley has quit his job at Fiddler's Green and is walking away from the checkpoint.
evidence_quotes: Riley hands over his ID.
SECURITY GUARD (Holding up the ID) You're gonna need this.
RILEY (Walking on) Nope. When I said quittin' time, I meant quittin' time.

relation_updates: Riley severs professional relationships with security and the elite.
status_updates: Riley is no longer employed at Fiddler's Green.
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Decides to leave his employment without retrieving his ID, indicating a break from the elite's security system.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: KAUFMAN tasks RILEY with stopping Cholo, who stole an armed vehicle, offering residence in the Green in return; RILEY demands resources, safe passage north, and inclusion of his friends, agreeing to find Dead Reckoning by midnight.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Riley negotiates with Kaufman to recover Dead Reckoning, securing a vehicle, weapons, ammunition, and inclusion of his friends for passage north by midnight.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Find Dead Reckoning by midnight in exchange for resources and passage north.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Riley has accepted the mission and agreed to the negotiated terms with Kaufman.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Whether Riley can find Dead Reckoning by midnight.
evidence_quotes: RILEY One more thing. My friends. They go with me.
KAUFMAN By midnight. RILEY I have a way.

relation_updates: Kaufman establishes a transactional relationship with Riley.
status_updates: Riley accepts a mission from Kaufman.
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Riley negotiates for resources and protection for his friends in exchange for completing the mission.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Riley fights off Walkers, saving several people before running out of ammo as Walkers close in, outnumbering him amidst the fleeing crowd.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Riley directs the blowing of the electrified fences, goes through the opening first, saves multiple civilians by firing at walkers, but runs out of ammo as walkers close in.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Through the fence opening, out of ammo, with walkers closing in.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Walkers closing in, situation seems hopeless.
evidence_quotes: RILEY is the first one through the opening.
Riley FIRES in all directions. WALKERS DROP around him.
He saves a WOMAN with a BABY...a YOUNG COUPLE...a PRIEST.
CLICK. He runs out of ammo. WALKERS close in.

relation_updates: Riley saves multiple civilians including a woman with baby, a young couple, and a priest.
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Saves civilians by engaging walkers with gunfire.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: The group agrees to head to Canada, with Riley confirming the plan and Slack approving their accompaniment as they prepare to travel north.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Confirms destination decision and joins traveling group
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Riley verifies group consensus to head to Canada and is approved by Slack to accompany them
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Group set to travel north to Canada
evidence_quotes: CHARLIE Canada. That's where we're goin', ain't it, Riley?
RILEY If no one has any objections.
No, we'll take you along with us.

relation_updates: Riley offers to be useful to the group.
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Offers to be useful to the group while heading to Canada

focal_character_timelines.timeline_summary: Riley begins as a survivor in a zombie apocalypse, revealing his poor shooting skills and taking on a leadership role on his last day. He suffers the loss of Mike, clashes with Cholo over values, quits his job at Fiddler's Green, and negotiates a mission with Kaufman. Driven by a personal plan to escape to Canada, he leads heroic actions to save people, ultimately deciding to head north with his companions.

focal_character_timelines.selection_reason: Aligned with the movie's ICRP character set.
focal_character_timelines.task3_relevance: Directly aligned with the same key character used in ICRP.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Riley finds Slack wounded but alive; they share a moment before police arrive, and Riley is arrested after reporting Chihuahua's death.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: captive who fights and rescues Riley
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Slack kicks Riley out of the line of fire, saving him from being shot, but is hit in the arm by Chihuahua's round and later found wounded but conscious.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Wounded in the right arm, conscious, in the cage with Riley before police arrest him.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Slack's arm injury and Riley's arrest by police.
evidence_quotes: Slack delivers a powerful KICK into the flexible fencing, sending Riley sprawling to the ground and saving him from...
...Chihuahua's round, which misses Riley...but HITS SLACK! Spun around by the impact, she falls face down.
SLACK I'm alright, I'M ALRIGHT!
Her right arm is BLEEDING, up near the shoulder.

status_updates: Slack is wounded in the arm
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Demonstrates quick action to save Riley and resilience after being shot.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Riley and Slack bond over shared trauma; Mulligan is violently taken by security for information, heightening tension as Riley comforts Slack.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Discloses past association with Mulligan and seeks to escape with Riley.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Slack reveals she was working with Mulligan's group and had military training, asks Riley to take her north, and they share mutual attraction.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: To escape the jail and go north with Riley.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: In jail with Riley, who comforts her after Mulligan's capture, their bond strengthened.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Mulligan's capture by security threatens Slack and escape plans due to potential interrogation.
evidence_quotes: SLACK They found out I was working with Mulligan and his people.
SLACK Wherever you're going, take me ith you.
SLACK I can shoot. And I can be pretty fucking useful. I had training. I was gonna join the Army.
They look at each other, clearly attracted.

relation_updates: Slack asks Riley to take her
Riley and Slack bond over shared trauma
status_updates: identified as part of Mulligan's group
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Determined to escape, shares personal history to build trust with Riley.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: The T-Bird engine starts; the team flees as a reanimated corpse attacks Teahouse, biting his arm. Charlie M shoots it. Riley reveals his brother turned after a bite. Slack, acknowledging Teahouse's fate, mercy-kills him.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Teammate who mercy-kills a bitten companion
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Slack shoots Teahouse after he is bitten by a walker to prevent reanimation.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: In the T-Bird with the team, having killed Teahouse.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Dealing with the necessity of killing a teammate.
evidence_quotes: SLACK (Softly) How long does he have?
SLACK Dead is dead. And that ain't you. And that ain't me.
SLACK (CONT'D) Sorry, man. I truly am. She draws her .45, aims at Teahouse, and FIRES.

relation_updates: deepens bond with Riley through shared stories
status_updates: has killed a teammate to prevent reanimation
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Pragmatic and decisive in survival situations.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Riley uses a homemade tracking device to locate Cholo and the stolen car Dead Reckoning within fifty miles, directing Slack to follow its signal while keeping Manolete and Pillsbury under guard.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: active participant in Riley's escape plan
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Slack learns Riley's plan to steal Dead Reckoning and drive it to Canada, and she explicitly approves, stating she likes the way he thinks.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: steal Dead Reckoning and escape to Canada
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Driving the T-Bird towards Dead Reckoning, following Riley's tracking directions.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Whether they will successfully steal Dead Reckoning from Cholo.
evidence_quotes: SLACK, driving the T-BIRD now, makes the turn.
SLACK No. I like the way you think.

status_updates: aware of escape plan and actively participating
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Approves of Riley's plan and continues driving as directed.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Manolete fires at Cholo, but Riley pushes him to safety, getting wounded. The Walker attacks Manolete, who is then shot by Slack. Slack and Pillsbury destroy the Walker.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Slack shoots Manolete in the head after he is attacked by a Walker, then helps Pillsbury destroy the Walker.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Manolete is dead, the Walker is destroyed.
evidence_quotes: Slack SHOOTS HIM in the head.
Then she and PILLSBURY open fire on the Walker, destroying it.

status_updates: Slack becomes a killer of Manolete
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Shoots Manolete to stop immediate threat, participates in Walker destruction.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Slack attempts to escape by pushing a dinghy into the river, cuts a tether despite rats attacking, and drifts away without steering or paddles as Charlie calls her name.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Slack shoves a dinghy into the river, cuts its tether while rats attack her hands, and is carried away by the current without steering or paddles.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: to escape the shore and rats by using the dinghy
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: adrift on the river, carried by the current, with no way to steer or paddle
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: separated from Charlie and adrift without means to control the boat
evidence_quotes: SLACK shoves one into the river
rats SNAP at her hands
Slack recoils, but keeps cutting.
The current carrying her away.

status_updates: adrift on a dinghy without steering
auxiliary.persona_anchor: resourceful and persistent in cutting the tether despite rat attacks

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Big Daddy heads toward Fiddler's Green with a pneumatic hammer but loses power; Number Nine and the Butcher eliminate threats, as undead followers gather tools to follow him to the glass-doored building.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Slack grabs the panicking Brian, tells him escape is possible, and runs with him toward Fiddler's Green High-Rise.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Running with Brian past a manhole surrounded by caution signs and flaming oil pots, heading to the high-rise.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Brian's father is still locked up, and their escape is uncertain.
evidence_quotes: SLACK runs past hysterical PEOPLE toward the FIDDLER'S GREEN HIGH-RISE.
Slack grabs him.
SLACK Brian! BRIAN We can't get out! There's no way out! SLACK There will be. Come with me. BRIAN Daddy! Daddy's still locked up.

status_updates: moves to vicinity of Fiddler's Green
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Takes responsibility for Brian's safety and acts decisively in the crisis.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Mulligan and revolutionaries are freed by Slack and Brian; Mulligan thanks Slack, embraces his son, and leads his men to retrieve their weapons.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Slack and Brian unlock and open jail cells to free Mulligan and his revolutionaries.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: free Mulligan and his men from jail
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Mulligan and revolutionaries free, preparing to retrieve weapons
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: retrieval of weapons
evidence_quotes: KEYS TURN in the locks of cell doors, which SLACK and BRIAN pull open.
Mulligan embraces his son and looks gratefully at Slack.
MULLIGAN (To his men) Let's go get our guns, boys.

relation_updates: establishes trust with Mulligan through rescue
auxiliary.persona_anchor: allied with revolution, taking action in rescue

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: The group agrees to head to Canada, with Riley confirming the plan and Slack approving their accompaniment as they prepare to travel north.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Slack approves Charlie's inclusion in the group's travel to Canada.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: travel to Canada with the group
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: The group, including Charlie, plans to travel north to Canada.
evidence_quotes: Riley looks at Slack.
SLACK No, we'll take you along with us.

relation_updates: Charlie is included in the group
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Decisive in including Charlie for the journey.

focal_character_timelines.timeline_summary: Slack starts as a captive fighter in the arena, where she and Riley rescue each other, forming a mutual bond. She reveals her traumatic past, commits to Riley's escape plan, and hardens through mercy-kills and combat. After separating and surviving alone, she reunites with allies, frees revolutionaries, and decides to journey to Canada with her group.
